ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the data entry */,
  "avg_measured_time" REAL /* Average measured travel time (in seconds) */,
  "vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles detected */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event if any (e.g., accident, road closure) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sensor that collected the data */,
  "road_segment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the road segment being monitored */,
  "speed_limit" REAL /* Speed limit of the road segment (in km/h) */,
  "traffic_density" REAL /* Density of traffic (vehicles per km) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the sensor */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_road_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_segment_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("road_segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the data entry */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature (in Celsius) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity (percentage) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (in millibars) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Air temperature (in Celsius) */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction (in degrees) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (in kilometers per hour) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sensor that collected the data */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Textual description of the weather condition */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation (in mm) */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility range (in meters) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the sensor */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., accident, road closure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., ongoing, resolved) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location or road segment */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the event */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the event */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Exact start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Exact end time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("road_segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., traffic, weather) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_segments" (
  "road_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road segment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the road segment */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the road segment (in km) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the road segment */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the road segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
